reviews.review_description: I got diabetes from this game

Love this app! Forget the real-life travel headaches, I have nothing but fun on my trips. Love the places I get to go, the things I get to see, and all the great stuff I get to learn about all the places I get to go with this app.

This is exactly what I've been looking for! A long list of travel locations - choose one and flip through the immersive images at your own pace. Some are maps (so you know where you are), some a short info panel to fill you in on each site, and most are 360 locations, and even some 3D. You feel like you're standing right in the middle of a beautiful flower-filled side street in France, for example. And I love the music variety that goes w/ each location. It's not perfect... (hopefully they'll keep at it)... one slide for example was just blank/white, sometimes an info slide would be in French  (even though I chose English). Just a few small little things, but overall I LOVE this app! I would totally be willing to pay for it. You get so much here for FREE! If you love to travel, this is the one for you.

I’ve had this app for a few months and this evening was the first time that I actually went in and went through a whole tour. I’m impressed. This is probably the most thorough travel app that I’ve used. You’ll get a very good idea of what a city has to offer as far as major attractions. The developers included a good number of pics for each city, with historical facts for most locations. Bravo!  You will learn a lot. ￼Although there is lot of content here, I hope they continue to add more locations.  I’m surprised that more people don’t talk about this app.
Very nice and fully featured google street view like thing, with very nice curated locations. Look at all these sidequest news updates. Good job.

reviews.review_title: One of the Best Travel Apps
reviews.review_description: The developers do a great job sending you around the different countries using full 360 photos from Google to put together really great trips. Unlike some apps that just use google street view, this app lets you go into various locations or sometimes way up in the air on what I guess must be drone photos. It's a great way to travel without travel. I've already seen so much that I would never have seen in my lifetime. This app is a great gift for someone that can't afford to hop country to country and travel the world.

I like the idea of google earth but make a feature where you can freely explore everything on earth.  Don’t force people to do limited experience.  I like this app because it has potential.  Wish you good luck for your project.

Thank you for sharing this project. It got stuck loading first 2 tries but I’m glad I persisted and got whisked away to Vietnam. I look forward to trying the other content.
All in, despite a slightly rocky start once loaded it ran very smoothly and transitioned quickly from scene to scene. 
Good job!

This is a promising little app but no consideration has been given to people who suffer from motion sickness.  All the zooming in and out is very bad for motion sickness sufferers and there's a lot of that going on in this app.

Also they need to add Israel.

I really enjoyed trying this out. Yes, its still a little "buggy" but worth checking out and the closest app to Google Earth that I've seen so far. I'd like to see a bit higher resolution on the fly overs however.

There are apps that are way better than this. 

Try out only get to see pre recorded Google map spots. You cannot see your own. 

There are better apps that do this. 

Now, my not installed list is cluttered even more…

reviews.review_title: Great app. Not fancy but very functional
reviews.review_description: It's like a real travel to guide me to the sightseeing tour in this app. For me, I can understand the game design and the concept of the develop team. Have to say even the UI or visual design of this app has large room to improvement, I cannot even know how to go back the main menu 😅. But I still enjoy being a virtual traveller. This app comes not fancy but very functional. Thank you for your hard work and keeping updates. Let people like me have chance to visit the beautiful places of the blue planet again. Great job!
Was thrilled to give this a go, but can’t get past the menu… pity, hope there’s a fix soon!
